colors.Blossom: A celebration of the color of red hued flowers in spring.
colors.Windflower: A pink skullpanda with petal-like collar details.
colors.Dawn: A bright yellow skullpanda with a ribbon.
colors.Dew: A celebration of small droplets of water on grass.
colors.Amber: This skullpanda has the icon of a fallen leaf in her eyes.

colors.24 Karat Gold: 24 Karat Gold is a colorway labubu doll from the pastel collection released by POPMART called Exciting Macaron. There is only one in the world. It is entirely made of gold bars melted down. Even the lanyard is made of pure gold.
colors.Dubai Choco Matcha Latte: This colorway is a labubu doll from the pastel collection released by POPMART called Exciting Macaron. It looks so similar to a real drink that fans have traditionally put it in a drinking glass
